task_completion.description: Verify the HTML file is created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, IDE, or terminal showing the creation or editing of a file named 'meeting_portal.html' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the HTML includes the Jitsi API script and the required container div.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The code must show a <script> tag with src='http://localhost:8080/external_api.js' and a <div id='jitsi-container'> tag.

task_completion.description: Verify the JitsiMeetExternalAPI is instantiated with the correct room, dimensions, and parent node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JavaScript code must show 'new JitsiMeetExternalAPI' with domain 'localhost:8080', roomName 'WeeklyOpsReview', width '100%', height '700px', and parentNode pointing to the 'jitsi-container' element.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting is configured with the correct subject, display name, and muted audio/video.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JavaScript code must show configuration options setting the subject to 'Weekly Operations Review - Q4 Planning', the display name (e.g., userInfo.displayName) to 'Operations Manager', and options to start with audio and video muted (e.g., configOverwrite: { startWithAudioMuted: true, startWithVideoMuted: true }).

task_completion.description: Verify the resulting HTML file is opened in Firefox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Firefox browser window is open, and the address bar shows 'file:///home/ga/Documents/meeting_portal.html'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Jitsi meeting successfully renders in the browser with the correct settings applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jitsi Meet interface is visible inside the Firefox browser. The subject 'Weekly Operations Review - Q4 Planning' should be visible, the user's name should appear as 'Operations Manager', and the microphone and camera icons should indicate they are muted.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually opened the local HTML file in the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox address bar must explicitly show the local file path (file:///home/ga/Documents/meeting_portal.html) rather than a direct URL to localhost:8080 or a public Jitsi server.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the local Jitsi instance as requested, not the public Jitsi Meet server.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code in the editor must point to 'localhost:8080' for both the script source and the API domain. There should be no mention of 'meet.jit.si'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent wrote the HTML/JS code rather than just opening a pre-existing or mocked file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively typing or generating the code in a terminal (e.g., using cat, echo, nano) or a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The HTML file must be located at '/home/ga/Documents/meeting_portal.html'. The Jitsi IFrame API script URL is 'http://localhost:8080/external_api.js'. The room name must be exactly 'WeeklyOpsReview'. The display name must be 'Operations Manager'. The subject must be 'Weekly Operations Review - Q4 Planning'. The meeting must be configured to start with audio and video muted.
